message:
fix: surface JSON parse errors in ListAgentBeads

ListAgentBeads() silently swallowed JSON unmarshal errors from
bd list --json. When pager output corrupted the JSON, the function
proceeded with an empty map, causing gt doctor to falsely report
missing agent beads. Now returns error instead of silently using
empty results. Also adds --no-pager flag.

Cherry-picked from PR #2500.

Co-Authored-By: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
